primary_text:
"I thought I could invest in the food system for $50." That's what one waitlist member told us.

Here's what we can show you. A Brookvale hub open Monday to Friday. Named regenerative farms across NSW. Fresh food reaching families in days, not weeks.

Zero warehouses. Zero wholesalers. Farmers earning a fairer price. Families eating food they can trace.

No middlemen. Sydney families already collect from the Brookvale hub. We can't promise returns, but we can show you everything.
headline: We can't promise returns
description: Honest about the risks, open about the model. Equity crowdfunding on Birchal, mid-2026. Not financial advice.
creative_brief: Clean white background. Direct, honest copy as the hero element. Small product photo below. Trust built through simplicity and negative space.
